productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women Multi Coloured Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Multi coloured printed tunic, has a round neckline with bead, lace and embroidered detail around it, cap sleeves and a brown spaghetti inner attached with a loop at the shoulders Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
